title: Nikt's Sweets
description: Add some customizable sweets in a vanilla+ style. Cookies, Chocolates, Candies, Popcorn you name it!
body:
# Nikt's Sweets
### Is a mod that adds upon Minecraft's food choices by adding sweets in a Vanilla+ style!

- You can now share your favorite sweets you made with a friend! Or instead compete over whose cookie looks more stylish. If you don't have friends you can make (some of) them for your pets (or imaginary friends)!
  
- This mod adds a decent amount of unique and customizable sweets. Mainly made for a fun time with friends for all those people who would like to make more foods in Minecraft without overcomplicating the process. There are no new tools or custom tables. Everything is done via recipes. And you're guided all by advancements to make more sweets!  
  
- Best used in Vanilla+ themed modpacks (and a friend)

<details>
<summary> Future development </summary>
    
Hi there, unfortunately there won't be a lot of further development to the mod, Updates to content will stop until further info but not new Minecraft versions(when they finally release lol). I'll keep this place up to date in case of any changes.

note- Not really many bugs in the latest update, i need to pat myself in the back. [Highly Explosive mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/highly-explosive) is released(i already have some fixes for HE there will be an update soon enough)

Thank you all for playing this silly little project :D
</details>


# Features:
### 🍪**Cookies**!
![Img](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/B6X5AoXE/images/833b5538b5c4dabc4c1d98af4aa4c2baa7469741.png)
### 🍫 **Chocolate** Bars
![Img2](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/B6X5AoXE/images/f4f642b455f794652267e75305b20f57fe708f27.png)
### 🍬Cheap and colorful **Candies**
![Img3](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/B6X5AoXE/images/3cfc98ca3390ca3f63df56bdba760f8317266e40.png)
### 🍿**Popcorn** and Corn
![Img4](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/B6X5AoXE/images/6999dd6a8582061b061e9307d04f41950e02cacd.png)
### 🍦**Ice Cream**
![Img5](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/B6X5AoXE/images/removedimage.png)
### ✨And a lot of **Misc**ellaneous additions:
![Img6](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/B6X5AoXE/images/c4e4d3363e09eb6e46c3167e8d2f0d1dfc06bb8b.png)
  
### All the screenshots are outdated by now :) (mainly in textures and removed features)

## Some answers to never asked questions:

-  Can i use the mod in a modpack? 
Yes! You certainly can i don't mind.

-  Does the mod work with [Mod name]? 
The mod will very likely **run with any** other mod. But if Sweets is causing issues hit me up. 

- Is there a fabric version?  
No and there won't be a fabric port. 

- I (have a problem) / (want to get in touch) where do i go?  
Message me on discord `@n1ktwazny`.

- Can i reupload your mod to *a* site?  
No you can't do that, that would be copyright infringement, but you can take inspiration and make your own based on this one or something. You can use my textures just don't say it's yours

- When is there going to be an update?  
I don't know.
